docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED JUN-17-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, RENE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-30-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $250.00 BEINNING ON AUGUST 31, 2011 AND CONTINUING ON THE LAST DAY OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT OF $7300.00 IS PAID.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, ARIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMORA, RENE $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,110.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,300.00 FILED BY GOMEZ, ARIEL AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, RENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APPEARED AND ADVISED THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT ONLY PAID $300. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
